title: Tyqour 200pcs 0.6 Inch Pom Pom Balls Glitter Fuzzy Pompom Puff Balls Multicolor Bulk Pom Poms Sparkle Balls Pompoms for Crafts DIY Art Creative Crafts Decorations
features: What You Get: You will receive 200pieces of colourful pompoms for crafts, including white, orange, blue, purple, pink, red, yellow, green and other mixed colours to suit your different decorating needs. Not suitable for children under the age of fourteen

Material: These handmade fluffy plush balls are made of high quality polyester fibre material with sparkling decorations on the surface, shiny appearance, light plush, non-fade, soft to the touch and not easy to break

Colourful Pom Pom Size: The diameter of these small colourful pompoms is 1.5cm/0.6inch, they are small and light, suitable for various crafts or decorative items and will not put extra pressure on your items

Wide Application: Small craft pompoms are perfect for decorating garlands, necklaces, making toys, necklaces, Christmas trees or making pendants, decorations, diy crafts, tassels, etc. You can let your imagination run wild with different uses
Note: These pom pom balls are lightweight and soft to the touch. Please keep them out of the reach of children. Children should use them under the supervision of a parent or guardian
